items.title: Expand Customer Journey Content Series
items.description: The customer journey page is the #2 performer with strong engagement. Create related content around sales process stages, objection handling, and follow-up sequences to capture more of this high-performing topic cluster.
items.expectedImpact: 15-25% increase in organic traffic from sales process queries

items.title: Optimize Title Tags and Meta Descriptions for Better CTR
items.description: Rewrite title tags for top-ranking pages to include compelling value propositions and emotional triggers. Focus on aged lead pages ranking 8-11 with titles like 'Get High-Converting Aged IUL Leads - Same Day Delivery' instead of generic titles. A/B test meta descriptions with specific benefits and urgency.
items.expectedImpact: Increase CTR from 0.15% to 0.25-0.35%, potentially doubling organic traffic

items.title: Create Comprehensive IUL Lead Buying Guide
items.description: Develop a pillar page targeting 'how to buy IUL leads' that consolidates all IUL-related content. Include comparison tables, pricing guides, vendor reviews, and conversion tips. Link all existing IUL pages to this comprehensive resource.
items.expectedImpact: Capture more long-tail IUL queries and increase average session duration by 30-40%

items.title: Optimize High-Performing IUL Content for Search
items.description: The /buy-iul-leads page ranks at position 8.7 and receives clicks but has low traffic volume. Create supporting content around 'aged iul leads' (position 7.7) and 'affordable aged life leads' (position 9.0) queries. Develop comprehensive IUL lead buying guides, comparison charts, and FAQ sections.
items.expectedImpact: Could increase organic clicks by 200-300% given strong existing positions

items.title: Extend Session Duration Through Content Depth
items.description: Add 'Related Articles' sections, embedded calculators, and downloadable resources to key pages. Focus on the customer journey page (40 views) by adding interactive elements, case studies, and step-by-step implementation guides.
items.expectedImpact: Target 25% increase in session duration while maintaining engagement rate

items.title: Optimize High-Ranking Pages for Better CTR
items.description: Focus on the IUL leads page (pos 8.6) and SMS templates page (pos 6.1) by improving title tags and meta descriptions to include more compelling CTAs and benefit-focused language. Test titles like 'Buy Premium IUL Leads - Qualified Prospects Ready to Convert' instead of generic product names.
items.expectedImpact: 15-25% increase in organic clicks from existing rankings

items.title: Extend Session Duration with Internal Linking Strategy
items.description: Add contextual internal links within the customer journey content (34 views) to related lead buying guides and CRM resources. Create content hubs that guide users through a logical progression from education to lead purchasing decisions.
items.expectedImpact: 20-30% increase in session duration and 15% boost in pageviews per session

items.title: Optimize High-Performing IUL Content for Search Expansion
items.description: Create additional IUL-focused content targeting related keywords like 'best iul leads', 'iul lead generation', and 'iul sales training'. Build internal linking from the successful /buy-iul-leads page to new supporting content.
items.expectedImpact: 20-30% increase in IUL-related organic traffic within 60 days

items.title: Develop Customer Journey Content Series
items.description: The customer journey page (32 views, 26 users) shows strong engagement. Create a comprehensive series covering each stage with downloadable resources, templates, and case studies for different lead types.
items.expectedImpact: Increase average pages per session by 25% and improve lead magnet conversions

items.title: Optimize High-Impression, Low-CTR Queries

items.expectedImpact: Could increase clicks by 30-50% on high-impression queries

items.title: Optimize High-Performing IUL Content

items.title: Address Session Duration Decline
items.description: Add related content suggestions, internal linking widgets, and downloadable resources to key pages. Focus on the customer journey page (31 views) and homepage (54 views) to extend engagement time.

items.title: Optimize meta titles and descriptions for aged leads content
items.description: Rewrite meta titles for aged leads pages to include compelling CTAs and benefits. Focus on 'aged life insurance leads' (position 20) and 'aged insurance leads' (position 23.4) queries. Add urgency and value propositions like 'Same Day Delivery' and 'Affordable Prices'.

items.title: Expand IUL Lead Content Strategy

items.title: Optimize High-Performing Content for Search

items.title: Expand High-Performing Insurance Content

items.expectedImpact: 20-30% increase in organic clicks from insurance-related queries within 60 days

items.title: Optimize for Featured Snippets

items.title: Improve Mobile Search Performance

items.title: Implement Internal Linking Strategy for Lead Lifecycle Content
items.description: Create topic clusters around lead management, sales processes, and CRM systems. Add contextual internal links between related pages like lead lifecycle management (ranking position 3.7) and CRM comparison pages to distribute link equity and improve user flow.

items.title: Develop Aged Lead Pricing Calculator Tool

items.title: Capitalize on SMS Templates Success
